title: T-044 — UI: PLN-042 Supplier-Product assignment sub-table (default enforcement)
prompt:
Build the supplier-product assignment sub-table embedded as a tab inside Supplier Detail (`/planning/suppliers/[id]` → `Products` tab) per `design/04-PLANNING-BASIC-UX.md` PLN-042.

Deliverable:
- `src/app/(planning)/suppliers/[id]/_components/SupplierProductsTab.tsx` — client component reading rows via Server Component prefetch + T-042 action.
- Inline editable table (shadcn DataTable + form-row pattern):
  - Columns: product (Combobox with server search), supplier_product_code, unit_price, currency (auto from supplier), lead_time_days (override, blank inherits from supplier), moq, order_multiple, is_default toggle, actions (Save / Remove).
  - Add row button at bottom → calls T-042 assignProductToSupplier on Save.
  - is_default toggle: only one row per (tenant, product) may be default. Toggling ON one row WHILE another product-row in another supplier is default must call T-042 setDefaultSupplierForProduct (which clears the other atomically). Show confirm dialog: 'Supplier X is currently default for product P. Replacing with this supplier?' before commit.
  - Remove row → confirm dialog → T-042 removeSupplierProduct.
- Empty state with primary CTA `Add product`.
- RBAC: `planning.suppliers.write` to mutate; otherwise read-only with badges + tooltips on disabled controls.

RED RTL tests under `__tests__/SupplierProductsTab.test.tsx`:
- Toggling is_default ON when another row already default → confirm dialog appears → on confirm, setDefaultSupplierForProduct is called with correct (product_id, supplier_id).
- Adding a duplicate (existing) product shows server error toast.
- Removing a row triggers confirm + removeSupplierProduct.
- Read-only mode hides Save / Remove / Add buttons.

Do NOT duplicate default-toggle logic on the client — always call setDefaultSupplierForProduct (server is the source of truth via partial-unique index). Do NOT bypass confirm dialog.

Close-out: paste RTL output + screenshot path of confirm dialog + parity check vs PLN-042 prototype.

pipeline_inputs.description: Supplier-Product assignment table with is_default enforcement via server action + confirm dialog.
pipeline_inputs.details: Embedded as Products tab in Supplier Detail. Inline-edit pattern. is_default toggle delegates to setDefaultSupplierForProduct (tx + unique index). RBAC gates mutations.
acceptance_criteria: Given product P has supplier A as default, when the user toggles is_default ON for supplier B in product P row, then a confirm dialog appears naming supplier A.
Given the user confirms the default replacement, when the dialog closes, then setDefaultSupplierForProduct is invoked once with (P, B).
Given the user adds a row with a product already linked to this supplier, when Save is clicked, then a toast surfaces the DUPLICATE server error and the row remains in edit mode.
Given the user clicks Remove, when the confirm dialog is accepted, then removeSupplierProduct is called and the row disappears.
Given a user without planning.suppliers.write, when the tab renders, then Add / Save / Remove / is_default toggle are disabled with tooltips.
Given `pnpm vitest run` on the test file, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED RTL tests for default-toggle confirm flow, duplicate error, remove flow, RBAC read-only.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement default-clearing client-side — only via setDefaultSupplierForProduct.
Do not skip confirm dialog before destructive ops.
